subcodes.title: Words to Ahmad Sohrab, spoken on 1913-01-22
subcodes.first_line: Once Muhammad Ali thought in a public way [to] show his superiority over ‘Abdu'l-Bahá. In those days the Blessed Perfection lived in the Palace of Bahji
subcodes.subjects: @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @humility; meekness; lowliness
